isomorphisms.bridge: Harmonic structure mirrors number theory — ratios, intervals, and proportional relationships
Strategic epistemology — knowledge as action, action as knowledge
Fractal geometry and self-similarity in aesthetics and organic form
Narrative identity — character arcs as personality development models
Contemplation and the scientific method — observation, hypothesis, surrender to evidence
Neural networks, genetic algorithms, emergent behavior in complex systems
Counterpoint as dialectic — independent voices creating meaning through tension and resolution
Fibonacci sequences, golden ratio, and mathematical patterns in natural growth
Modern mythmaking — superheroes, pop icons, and archetypal narratives
Moving meditation — the body as instrument of contemplative practice
Hypertext, interactive fiction, and the evolution of narrative through code
Geometric abstraction, perspective, and the mathematics of visual perception
